name: parlor
hints: The parlor has a Ju-Ju man statue. Examine it carefully.
The Ju-Ju man statue may contain something or have significance to the voodoo theme.
LOOK STATUE or examine it. DOWN returns to the stairwell.
notes: Parlor upstairs from the stairwell with a Ju-Ju man statue. DOWN returns to the stairwell (room 2). Reached by GO STAIRS from room 2.
